item.title: Some of my Favorite 3D Prints
item.description: I’m often asked what my favorite things to print are, here’s my response to that question.

item.title: Building My First FPV Drone
item.description: In this post, I share my journey of building my first FPV drone, including the components I chose, the assembly process, and the challenges I faced along the way.
